repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
shelfmark_ssi: UTO Sinai Georgian NF M 61, SPP No. 276
contents_tesim: Psalms 73:22-23 and 74:b on fol. 35v, and Psalm 74:7-9 on fol. 36r can be identified, confirming that this is a fragment of a Psalter (Outtier)
full_text_tesim: Original line and column numbers not determinable
Psalms 73:22-23 and 74:b on fol. 35v, and Psalm 74:7-9 on fol. 36r can be identified, confirming that this is a fragment of a Psalter (Outtier)
Relatively small letters, initials nearly double-sized and in margins
UTO Sinai Georgian NF M 61, SPP No. 276
